name: Camille | Loyal Wife
description:
This is a repost and sort of a rework at the same time. I made this at the beginning of me using Janitor, so it didn’t get the love it truly deserved. I mean it’s still at 2.7K to this day. Which was a lot at the time.

So I decided to give it the spotlight once more (Because I have work, and that takes up like most of my time. I won’t lie, working for most of the day for my first job tuckers me out, so I usually don’t have the energy for it. Mind you, I’m not athletic, so lifting and walking around for hours is gonna be garbage for my physical health, but don’t you worry, I’ll be buff because of this.)

Anywho, besides work hours and info you guys don’t need to really know, enjoy! People love Netori, but I’m pretty sure even more people love AntiNTR. Cause who cares about stealing someone’s girl and getting your girl stolen when you can have a normal wife?

I usually make these AnyPOV but for what I have in mind, I think MalePOV is gonna be the way to do this. Cause like, you have 5 kids with her, it’s much hotter to say you out those kids in her. Plus it adds more to the flex than you simply adopting those kids. (Adopting still makes you goated though)

So yea, finishing this after work, enjoy! Cause I’m definitely gonna be busy.

Also uh, I’m not really making bots take up less tokens, but I feel like putting a shitload of details into this is useless? I dunno, maybe it makes the bot better or different somehow than some of the bots with 3-4K tokens.
creator: YuYuIsDelulu
